about: Suggest a new capability or workflow

## What's the problem

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's painful? Describe the user-facing situation, not the implementation. -->

## What you'd like

<!-- A short, concrete description of the change. -->

## Why this fits Harness

<!-- Harness is opinionated: real-user-style testing, no scripted UI tests, no a11y-id reliance.
     How does this proposal fit that opinion? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they enough? -->

## Anything else

<!-- Mocks, links, prior art. -->
